title: HomeMod
description: Mods that allow you to set up a home and teleport.
body:
This is a mod that allows you to set up a home and teleport to your "home".
How to use:
/sethome {name}      <===set a home!
/home {name}         <===teleport to you home!
/delhome {name}      <===delete you home!

The name of the home can be left blank, defaulting to:
Chinese for "xxx's home"
